images.title: Remorquage de la bouée instrumentée SCENES (Ifremer 00623-73509 - 37368).jpg
images.description: This buoy, installed for a test period on the Ifremer concession of Sainte Anne du Portzic, is financed by the CPIER PHRESQUES. It is the result of the collaboration between ODE/DYNECO and REM/RDT with the participation of the SME GEPS TECHNO for the supply of energy (wave energy system). This buoy, associated with a bottom module, will then be deployed at the mouth of the Seine estuary, integrating into a high-frequency observation network of water quality on the land-sea continuum, from upstream of Paris to the Bay of Seine. For more information on the project .

images.title: SPEEDoo - Démonstration de l'utilisation du préleveur d'eau radiopiloté (Ifremer 00562-67396 - 23000).jpg
images.description: SPEEDoo is a marine drone, a remotely piloted water sampling system, to quickly and easily take water samples at sea, up to 500 meters from the coast. Here, the device is presented and tested in Sainte-Anne du Portzic. It was developed by two research units of the Ifremer Bretagne Center in Brest: DYNECO (Dynamics of the coastal environment) and RDT (Research and Technological Developments). Measuring 1 meter long and 30 cm wide, the device has multiple equipment that allows it to both take water samples and measure basic physicochemical elements in situ (temperature, salinity, etc.).
